text: No Java source files in the pinned kafka (0753c489) or flink (0cc95fcc) mirrors reference the deprecated Kafka producer configuration keys block.on.buffer.full, metadata.fetch.timeout.ms, or timeout.ms (the old producer timeout). These deprecated configs were removed from apache/kafka prior to this 4.x snapshot — ProducerConfig.java contains zero @Deprecated annotations. The block.on.buffer.full config was deprecated in Kafka 0.9.0.0 (replaced by max.block.ms) and removed by Kafka 3.x. The metadata.fetch.timeout.ms config was similarly deprecated and folded into max.block.ms. The standalone timeout.ms producer config does not exist in this version (delivery.timeout.ms, request.timeout.ms, and transaction.timeout.ms are the current timeout configs, none deprecated). The flink mirror (0cc95fcc) references ProducerConfig in only 2 files (SqlClientITCase.java and KafkaStandaloneGenerator.java), both of which use only current, non-deprecated config keys (BOOTSTRAP_SERVERS_CONFIG, ACKS_CONFIG, KEY_SERIALIZER_CLASS_CONFIG, VALUE_SERIALIZER_CLASS_CONFIG). The Flink Kafka connector has been externalized to flink-connector-kafka, so no Kafka producer config references appear in the core Flink repo beyond these test/example utilities.

_metadata.notes: EMPTY ORACLE: The three deprecated producer config keys asked about (block.on.buffer.full, metadata.fetch.timeout.ms, timeout.ms) were fully removed from apache/kafka prior to this 4.x snapshot. ProducerConfig.java has zero @Deprecated annotations. This task's instruction targets configs that no longer exist in the pinned mirror and should be updated to either (a) pin an older Kafka version where these configs still exist, or (b) rewrite the instruction to ask about configs that are actually deprecated in this Kafka 4.x version (e.g., StreamsConfig.DEFAULT_PRODUCTION_EXCEPTION_HANDLER_CLASS_CONFIG, deprecated since 4.0).
